uncovered_waiver.reason: handler.py is an explicitly-documented THIN coordination shell ('this node is a thin coordination shell over that validation-layer logic, per the nodes-are-thin/handlers-own-logic repo invariant') — nearly all branch complexity lives in omnibase_core.validation.checker_routing_authority (run_routing_authority_check), which this receipt does not score (out of source_match scope by design: scoring the real check logic separately from the thin dispatch wrapper). Within handler.py's own scope, this pool exercises: check() delegation, handle() delegation (both call paths), positive-proof pass/missing-model_routing/missing-key/unknown-endpoint-ref, negative-audit clean/env-read/provider-literal/skip-token/missing-source-content, residue ratchet clean/within-baseline/exceeds-baseline, and all 3 provider-endpoint-shape violation classes.
